extracted_information: Codecademy Workspaces is an online code editor allowing users to build, share, and experiment with projects directly in their browser without requiring a local development environment setup. It supports 13 popular languages and libraries, functions as a familiar IDE, and offers features like sharing projects via a link, setting privacy levels, and porting in projects from Codecademy courses.

features.name: Build and Share Projects
features.description: Create and distribute coding projects directly from the browser.

features.name: Practice and Experiment
features.description: Tinker with code, practice building independent projects, and test different approaches to sharpen problem-solving skills.

features.name: Instant Coding Access
features.description: Start coding immediately in a familiar IDE without needing to set up a separate development environment.

features.name: Share with a Link
features.description: Send code to other Codecademy account holders via a shareable link.

features.name: Privacy Control
features.description: Decide who can access or find your work and change privacy settings at any time.

features.name: Port In Projects
features.description: Easily move work from Codecademy courses and existing projects into a workspace for further testing and development.

technical_capabilities.setup_requirement: No separate development environment setup needed
technical_capabilities.sharing_mechanism: Link sharing to Codecademy account holders

ide_functionality.primary_function: Code editing, project building and testing
